docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,609.07 FILED BY CHANG, DAVY AS TO DEFENDANT VIRGINIA SURETY COMPANY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DAVY CHANG IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT VIRGINIA SURETY COMPANY, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PARTIES HAVE ENTERED INTO AN UNCONDITIONAL SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT (CM-200). CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
